subcodes.first_line: It behooveth thee to render thanks unto God, through all the tongues of His creation, inasmuch as He hath aided thee to recognize the Dawning-Place of His Revelation and the Dayspring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینبغی لک بان تشکر الله بعدد السن الخلائق بما ایدک علی الاعتراف بمطلع وحیه و مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
